title: Bridge WETH - Open Across App
meta_description: bridge weth through Across to move wrapped ether between supported Ethereum networks. Open the app, verify token details, and sign from your wallet.
hero_h2: Move wrapped ether across supported chains
hero_lead: bridge weth with Across to move WETH between supported Ethereum and L2 networks from a wallet-first app, checking the route, token contract, and gas asset before you sign.
what_is: Across is a cross-chain transfer app for moving tokens between supported networks; WETH is wrapped ether, an ERC-20 representation of ETH explained by ethereum.org. Use this page as a clean route into the official Across app, then verify the network pair and token before signing.

how.d: Use the official app link and confirm the domain before connecting a wallet.
Choose the wallet that holds WETH on the source network and switch networks only through trusted wallet prompts.
Pick WETH, the origin chain, and the destination chain, then check that the app supports the route.
Read the quote, approval, destination address, and gas asset before submitting any transaction.

points.p: The primary action is the official Across transfer interface; this page keeps context short and sends users to the app.
Before moving assets, compare WETH symbols and contract addresses with the canonical mainnet listing on Etherscan and the destination network explorer.
Blockchain bridges carry smart contract and operational risk; ethereum.org outlines common bridge trade-offs before you move funds.

faq.q: How do I bridge weth with fewer mistakes?
faq.a: Open the official Across app, confirm the domain is across.to, select WETH and the networks, then review the quote and wallet prompts before signing.

faq.q: Is WETH the same as ETH when moving across networks?
faq.a: No. WETH is an ERC-20 representation of ETH; native ETH is still needed for gas on many EVM networks.

faq.q: Which WETH contract should I check?
faq.a: For Ethereum mainnet, verify the canonical WETH contract on Etherscan; other networks may use different addresses.

faq.q: Does Across show details before signing?
faq.a: The app presents route and transaction details before wallet approval; network gas and quoted amounts can change until submitted.

faq.q: Can I send WETH to Arbitrum or Base?
faq.a: Across supports Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Optimism, and other networks in its app; choose only routes currently offered in the interface.

footer_note: This page is not the official Across app; verify across.to before connecting a wallet. Educational information only, not financial advice.
